title: pelargonium × selectum
intro: Pelargonium × selectum, also known as the Rose Geranium or Pelargonium roseum, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from the presence of geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × selectum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
